//: Tool allow-list baked into each teammate agent's frontmatter at `ctm init` time.
//default: Used for any agent name not listed under "agents" — this covers the whole tiered dev set (be-/fe- x junior/medior/senior) and most custom tm-* agents.
//agents: Per-agent override, keyed by the generated agent name. Only list an agent here if it genuinely needs a DIFFERENT toolset: a repo-level entry is a heavier thing for a project to reason about than the plain default.
//tiers: The dev tiers deliberately share one toolset, so they are NOT listed below. Tools cannot separate seniority anyway — task.sh runs through Bash, so every teammate needs Bash/Read whatever its level. What separates the tiers is the MODEL (templates/agents-manifest.json) and the scope in templates/agent-tiers/*.md.
//format: Each value is either a comma-separated string or a JSON array of tool names.
//override: A project overrides this with its own .claude/agent-tools.json — per agent (.agents[name]) or for every agent at once (.default). The PROJECT config wins over this file entirely; see engine/agent-tools.sh for the precedence. Manage it with: ctm agent tools set|add|rm|unset.
//mandatory: A small core (MANDATORY_TOOLS in engine/agent-tools.sh) is always unioned in and cannot be configured away — without it an agent could not run task.sh at all.
default: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep, SendMessage, mcp__ide__getDiagnostics
//playwright: ctm-playwright-tester needs the Playwright MCP server; without it the agent is installed but can't drive a browser — see the roster note in SKILL.md.

agents.ctm-playwright-tester: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, SendMessage, mcp__playwright__browser_navigate, mcp__playwright__browser_snapshot, mcp__playwright__browser_click, mcp__playwright__browser_type, mcp__playwright__browser_fill_form, mcp__playwright__browser_select_option, mcp__playwright__browser_press_key, mcp__playwright__browser_hover, mcp__playwright__browser_wait_for, mcp__playwright__browser_take_screenshot, mcp__playwright__browser_console_messages, mcp__playwright__browser_network_requests, mcp__playwright__browser_evaluate, mcp__playwright__browser_tabs, mcp__playwright__browser_resize, mcp__playwright__browser_close
